coverage.note: Retrofit-only scope; no production Java code added or modified. Coverage gate applies to producer code (KnowledgeAssembler, story-0051-0001) and downstream cleanup (story-0051-0006).

delta.note: Net delta of -9: 10 OLD-contract @Disabled tests removed (RULE-051-07 forbids the fields they asserted), 3 new invariant methods added to SkillConsumerRetrofitInvariantTest. 1 existing KnowledgeMigrationInvariantTest unchanged.

acceptanceCriteriaCheckResults.evidence: 21 SKILL.md + 7 auxiliary files (README.md, references/*.md) under skills/core/ identified and retrofitted via regex script; 90+ path replacements applied
Sampled retrofits verified: skills/{kp}/SKILL.md references replaced with knowledge/{kp}.md (simple) across 21 SKILL.md files. grep confirms 0 residual legacy references.

Sampled retrofits verified: skills/{kp}/references/foo.md replaced with knowledge/{kp}/foo.md (complex) or inlined to knowledge/{kp}.md (simple). x-arch-plan and x-story-plan show 19-22 new knowledge/ references each.

SkillConsumerRetrofitInvariantTest asserts via Files.walk+grep that no SKILL.md or auxiliary file under skills/core/ references the legacy skills/{kp}/SKILL.md or skills/{kp}/references/ paths. Test is green.

checks: All 21 retrofitted SKILL.md files use the knowledge/ prefix uniformly
All 7 auxiliary files (README.md + references/*.md) use the knowledge/ prefix uniformly
2 broken retrofit artifacts (.mdreferences/ malformed in x-story-plan and x-arch-plan) fixed manually pre-commit
No residual skills/{kp}/SKILL.md or skills/{kp}/references/ references anywhere under skills/core/

smokeResult.note: mvn test: BUILD SUCCESS at 4162 tests / 0 failures / 0 errors / 0 skipped. Invariant tests KnowledgeMigrationInvariantTest and SkillConsumerRetrofitInvariantTest both green.
